archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for approachable business trust

typography.rules: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) on headings. The main H1 should use leading-none. Do not use Inter for headings.

copywriting.main_headline: Ledakkan Penjualan UMKM Anda dengan Digital Marketing
copywriting.sub_headline: Kami membantu UMKM meningkatkan penjualan, membangun brand kuat, dan menjangkau ribuan pelanggan baru melalui strategi pemasaran digital yang terbukti efektif.

hero_section.left_column: Left-aligned narrative text, bullet points, CTA button, and trust badges placed immediately below the CTA.
hero_section.right_column: Visual showcasing the human element of UMKM overlapping with digital growth metrics.
hero_section.background_elements: Subtle grid pattern or radial gradient to add depth to the background without distracting from content.

component_rules: The primary CTA button must be highly prominent with the cta_button color (#EA580C).
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements such as buttons and links.

media_and_images.description: Confident café owner representing an Indonesian UMKM.
media_and_images.instructions_to_main_agent: Use this image on the right side of the split layout. Apply a subtle rounded border (e.g., rounded-2xl) and slight shadow. Overlay a small floating Glassmorphism card on the corner of this image to display a 'sales growth chart'.

media_and_images.description: Analytics dashboard to be used as a small floating card overlay.
media_and_images.instructions_to_main_agent: Use this image inside a small floating glassmorphic card overlapping the cafe owner image to visually communicate 'digital marketing growth'.

motion_and_interactions.hero_entrance: Staggered fade-in and slide-up for the headline, sub-headline, and CTA (using Framer Motion).
motion_and_interactions.button_hover: Scale 1.05 with a soft drop-shadow in the CTA color.
motion_and_interactions.image_floating: Subtle continuous float animation for the overlay analytics card (Y-axis translation).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on the #EA580C button meets WCAG AA contrast ratios.
accessibility.focus_states: All buttons and links must have a visible 2px outline on focus.
